ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user (M/F) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date the user signed up for the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "subscription_level" TEXT /* Current subscription level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription plan */,
  "subscription_name" TEXT /* Name of the subscription plan */,
  "price" REAL /* Monthly price of the subscription */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the subscription (e.g., monthly, yearly) */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features included in the subscription plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subscription plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_subscriptions" (
  "user_subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user subscription link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the user's subscription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the user's subscription */,
  "auto_renew" INTEGER /* Whether the subscription auto-renews */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Status of the subscription (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "subscription_required" TEXT /* Subscription level required to access the course */,
  "course_category" TEXT /* Category of the course */,
  "course_tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrolled user */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the enrolled course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user enrolled in the course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of the course completion (e.g., completed, in-progress) */,
  "progress" REAL /* User's progress in the course (0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user making the payment */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the subscription plan associated with the payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid by the user */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, paypal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user assigned a role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role assigned to the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., subscription, payment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user for whom the activity is recorded */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed by the user (e.g., login, course access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscription_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription change */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user whose subscription changed */,
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the new subscription plan */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the subscription change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., upgrade, downgrade) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_subscription_id FOREIGN KEY ("subscription_id") REFERENCES subscriptions ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscription_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who rated the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rated course */,
  "rating" REAL /* User's rating for the course (1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* User's review of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_ratings_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)
